11001.0.name: Vriddhi Sandhi
11001.0.description: The vowels 'ā', 'ai', and 'au' are called Vṛddhi.

11003.0.name: Guna and Vriddhi Substitution
11003.0.description: Guna and Vriddhi substitute for 'ik' (i, u, ṛ, ḷ) vowels.

11007.0.name: Samyoga (Conjunct Consonants)
11007.0.description: Consonants uninterrupted by vowels are termed 'Samyoga'.

Vowel.name: Ach Sandhi (Vowel Sandhi)
Vowel.description: A junction where two vowels merge to form a single phonetic sound.

Consonant.name: Hal Sandhi (Consonant Sandhi)
Consonant.description: A junction involving at least one consonant changing form.
